heroSubtitle: A technical demonstration of a Customer Support Agent built with LangGraph, Groq Llama 3, and Supabase pgvector. Showcasing multi-step reasoning, RAG over complex SOPs, and stateful tool execution.
howItWorksSubtitle: Demonstrates advanced architectural patterns for deploying reliable, stateful LLM applications.
smartMatchingDesc: SOP chunks are embedded locally using all-MiniLM-L6-v2 and retrieved rapidly via Supabase pgvector.
automatedOutreachDesc: Built with LangGraph to orchestrate multi-turn troubleshooting, context preservation, and deterministic tool execution.
trackProgressDesc: Background guest provisioning guarantees that each visitor experiences an isolated, seamless conversation without needing to sign up.
copyright: (c) 2026 AI Customer Support Agent. All rights reserved.
loginSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
signupSubtitle: Create an account to get started
loginDescription: Enter your email below to login to your account
signupSuccessDesc: You've successfully signed up. Please check your email to confirm your account before signing in.
dashboardSubtitle: Welcome to your business dashboard! Here you can manage your subscription, view and receive referrals from your clients, and track your business growth.
selectConversation: Select a conversation to start chatting
businessSettingsDesc: Configure your AI Customer Service Agent details, tone, and escalation rules.
saveSuccessDesc: Your AI agent configuration has been updated successfully.
